archetype: Control Room Data-Dense (Swiss & High-Contrast adapted for Dark Mode)

surfaces_and_materials.ambient_halo: relative after:absolute after:inset-0 after:bg-cyan-500/10 after:blur-[40px] after:-z-10
surfaces_and_materials.animated_border: mask-image shimmering gradient line using framer-motion or CSS background-clip

layout.grid_mode: Control Room Grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4)

v6_layout_structure.right_sidebar: Position Health, Safety Activity, Setup Grade consoles

motion_and_interactions.pulse: Heartbeat bar uses subtle opacity/scale pulses based on state (cyan/amber/rose)
motion_and_interactions.data_stream: Number tickers and subtle flash on data update (green/red blink)

components.provenance_ring: Decision Donut chart showing pillar breakdown + weights. Mini-arcs on scanner rows.
components.why_trace_pipeline: Horizontal or vertical connected node funnel (Regime -> In-Play -> Setup -> Style -> TQS -> Verdict).
components.strategy_autonomy_console: Matrix table/grid of strategies vs regime, with toggle states and edge-decay meters.
components.thesis_invalidation_tag: Rose or Amber tinted badge with struck-through text or skull/crossbones for dead trades.
components.heartbeat_pulse_bar: Fixed 5px top border div with framer-motion glowing pulse.

instructions_to_main_agent.overall_goal: Build a trust-and-explainability-first UI for SentCom/TradeCommand. Strictly avoid purple/AI-slop. Use dark glassmorphism (rgba(21,28,36) base, 24px blur).

track_A_v5_incremental.description: Enhance existing v5 tabs (Command Center, Mission Control, etc.) without a full rewrite.
tasks: Add a 'Trade Trace' modal or expandable row in Mission Control to show the 6-step WHY TRACE.
Integrate 'Regime Weather' badge in the Command Center header.
Add 'Strategy Autonomy' tab/panel to Settings or Mission Control.
Update the Verdict block to show the unified TQS+ML score.
Use Provenance Ring (donut chart) for the TQS pillar breakdown in Trade Journal and Verdict blocks.

track_B_v6_redesign.description: Total single-page cockpit redesign realizing the V6 vision. The 'Why-Trace' is the hero element.
tasks: Implement a strict layout: Top 5px Heartbeat Pulse Bar (cyan/amber/rose).
Implement a top 'Day-Narrative Strip' with a Time Scrubber.
Center layout: A unified 'Why-Trace' visual pipeline funnel showing the 6 seams.
Right sidebar: Position Health Console, Safety Activity Stream, Setup Grade Board.
Implement right-side ⌘K AI chat drawer (NIA) with glassmorphism + ambient-halo.
Every row in the scanner must have a Provenance Ring mini-arc for instant decision transparency.

six_seams_implementation: 1. Style/Liquidity Lens: Setup Grade Board must show the active lens (e.g., 'Scalp Lens') and dynamic weights.
2. Unified TQS+ML: Single 'Decision Authority' metric combining 0-100 score + High/Med/Low confidence gate into one verdict.
3. Unified WHY TRACE: Render a 6-node flow diagram or breadcrumb (Regime -> In-Play -> Setup -> Style -> TQS -> Verdict -> Exit).
4. Regime-fit Abstention: Show 'STAND DOWN' state clearly when regime is hostile (dimmed UI with amber/rose warning).
5. Thesis-invalidation: In the exit reason field, highlight if closed due to 'Regime Flipped' or 'Premise Broke'.
6. Autonomy Console: Grid showing 'Strategy Family' | 'Current Edge Decay' | 'Regime Fit' | 'Status (Enabled/Disabled)'.
instructions_to_main_agent.testing_requirements: All interactive elements, decision nodes, and metrics MUST include `data-testid` attributes (e.g., data-testid='why-trace-node-regime', data-testid='provenance-ring-verdict', data-testid='heartbeat-pulse-bar').
instructions_to_main_agent.tech_stack: React, TailwindCSS, framer-motion, lucide-react, shadcn/ui components (customized for dark glassmorphism). Javascript (.js) only.
